graded_findings.rationale: The user-facing dscli command guide omits the newly added status command from its supported subcommands and reference material. That is a real documentation adherence gap for a new CLI surface and should block until documented.

The shared repository index is stale because it omits the new cli/status.py module. This should be regenerated, but it is secondary navigational context rather than the primary user-facing or design contract.

The implementation does not satisfy the spec requirement to print a trailing total-count summary. A MUST-level spec/behavior mismatch is substantive and should block until the code or spec is reconciled.
The gather finding says this plan was updated appropriately and accurately reflects the implemented work. There is no adherence gap to grade here.
